tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
delete 2
delete 3
end
config firewall policy
edit 2
set name "UBUNTU_EGRESS_DENY_ALL"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action deny
set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
set dstaddr "all"
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
edit 3
set name "UBUNTU_EGRESS_RESTRICT"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action accept
set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
set dstaddr "CALDERA_C2"
set schedule "always"
set service "HTTPS"
set nat enable
set logtraffic all
next
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
